tweet:
🚨 NY 2 @ TOR 0 - NY WINS! 🚨

Kayle Osborne was PERFECT between the pipes with 31 saves for the SHUTOUT! 🥅 Meanwhile, Kristýna Kaltounková lit the lamp twice to lead NY's offensive attack. Chuli kept Toronto in it with a stellar 95.2% save percentage but it wasn't enough!

#PWHL

🎯 PERFECT NIGHT for Kristýna Kaltounková! 

#98 goes 2-for-2 with a 100% shooting performance, netting both goals in NY's 2-0 shutout win over Toronto! When you only need 2 shots to score 2 goals, that's elite efficiency 📊🔥

#PWHL

🚨 ELAINE CHULI SHUTOUT ALERT! 🚨

Chuli was ABSOLUTE FIRE between the pipes for Toronto, stopping 20/21 shots (.952 SV%) in a dominant 2-0 victory over New York! 

That's how you steal two points at home! 🔥

#PWHL #ChuliFortress
